name: Cappucino Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------COFFEE KAHLUA CREAM GLAZE-------------------------
1. In a large bowl, cream together 3/4 cup oil and 1/2 cup honey until well combined.
2. Add sugar, eggs, milk, sour cream, creme de cacao, and Kahlua to the oil mixture. Beat until smooth.
3. Combine flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, instant coffee, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, mixing well with an electric mixer.
5. Grease and flour a tube pan (9-inch) and pour in the batter.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
8. For the glaze, mix 1 cup cream, instant coffee, 2 tbsp sugar, and 1 tbsp Kahlua in a bowl. Beat until stiff peaks form.
9. Spread the glaze over the cooled cake.
